title: La agricultura europea ya no es intocable para los políticos
summary: La entrada en vigor del acuerdo con Mercosur debilita el 'lobby' agrario, que pierde su histórico poder político, y fuerza a Europa a elegir entre proteger sus granjas familiares o competir globalmente. Leer

title: Elecciones Andalucía 17-M: Más que una mayoría absoluta regional en juego
summary: El peso demográfico y electoral de Andalucía confiere una dimensión nacional a la cita del domingo. El PP busca revalidar su mayoría absoluta para no depender de Vox, y el PSOE evitar una debacle histórica. Leer

title: Up to 34C: Spain to experience summer-like temperatures this week
summary: This week is set to be the hottest of the year so far across much of Spain, the country's weather agency has announced.

title: Spain mulls tighter mortgage requirements
summary: The Bank of Spain is considering imposing stricter rules for securing a mortgage, while acknowledging this could have an impact on young and lower-income buyers in the country.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Monday
summary: Bizum app to work for payments in shops in Spain, Canadian cops arrested for sexual assault in Barcelona, Spain says Ebola risk 'very low' amid DRC and Uganda outbreak and more news on Monday May 18th.

title: Spanish PM faces fresh blow in key Andalusia vote
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez's Socialists appeared set for an unprecedented drubbing in Andalusian regional elections that could see far-right Vox govern in another Spanish region, partial results showed.

title: Bulgaria's 'Bangaranga' wins Eurovision, with Israel second
summary: Bulgaria won the Eurovision Song Contest on Sunday with Dara's catchy floor-filler "Bangaranga" sweeping the 70th edition of the world's biggest live televised music event and pushing into second place Israel, whose participation had triggered a major boycott.

title: British mountaineer, 61, dies in Spanish national park
summary: Spanish emergency services on Saturday recovered the body of a missing British mountaineer whose appeal for rescue from a freezing high-altitude route went in vain due to fierce blizzards.
